name: mr-maliang
description: Unified long-form writing and computational research workflows

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @mr-maliang/research-protocol && npm run build --workspace @mr-maliang/longexperiment && npm run build --workspace @mr-maliang/longwrite && npm run build --workspace @mr-maliang/maliang
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @mr-maliang/research-protocol && npm run test --workspace @mr-maliang/longexperiment && npm run test --workspace @mr-maliang/longwrite && npm run test --workspace @mr-maliang/maliang
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run maliang -- template list
